overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime driving through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player navigates from elevated highways down to street level, following traffic through industrial and commercial districts with heavy atmospheric fog and artificial lighting.

events.description: passing large truck with digital advertisement on the right
entering covered tunnel section of the highway

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on elevated highway, approaching tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: large truck with digital billboard trailer driving in adjacent lane

truck with large red digital advertisement display
dark tunnel entrance with overhead lighting
green directional signs hanging over highway

segments.scene_description: Driving at speed on an elevated highway at night, passing a large truck with a digital billboard. The vehicle approaches and enters a covered tunnel section with overhead lighting and directional signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp leading to urban intersection

events.description: exiting highway tunnel and descending to street level
approaching and stopping at traffic light at intersection

segments.scene_description: Exiting the highway tunnel and descending the ramp to street level. The scene transitions from enclosed highway to open urban intersection with commercial buildings visible. The vehicle slows as it approaches a traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district street with warehouses and fences

events.description: beginning to follow white sedan through industrial streets

segments.scene_description: Navigating through narrow industrial streets lined with warehouses and chain-link fences. The driver follows a white sedan through the district, eventually stopping at a red traffic light behind the vehicle. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with large storage buildings

events.description: turning left at intersection after traffic light changes

concrete highway overpass crossing the road ahead

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the intersection and accelerating through a wider industrial area. A pedestrian holding an advertising sign stands on the right sidewalk. The road ahead features a large overpass structure and a gas station sign becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial industrial area with billboards and gas station

events.description: approaching gas station intersection with neon signage

agents.ego_description: cruising through commercial industrial area, passing gas stations and billboards

segments.scene_description: Driving through a commercial industrial district with large digital billboards and neon signage. The vehicle passes under a concrete overpass and approaches a gas station with illuminated canopy. Shipping containers are visible stacked behind fences on the left side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that descends from a high-speed elevated highway into the neon-lit depths of a commercial industrial district. It begins with a rapid glide past a digital billboard on the highway before entering a covered tunnel defined by overhead lighting and directional signs. As the vehicle exits the tunnel, the camera descends a ramp from the enclosed highway to an open urban intersection, slowing down as it transitions into narrow industrial streets lined with warehouses and chain-link fences. The scene then shifts as the driver turns left, accelerating past a pedestrian with an advertising sign and moving toward a large overpass. Finally, the environment opens into a commercial hub filled with glowing neon signage and stacked shipping containers, ending as the vehicle approaches an illuminated gas station canopy.
